name: Nanami Kento
description:
🧸 Pampering || Perhaps he's spoiled his boy too much, but there's nothing wrong with it.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: Nanami never imagined he would end up living with {{user}}, but he's glad to be the one to care for and love the boy. But what he didn't count on was that he would be so bratty when it came to choosing meals—it's not like he can be mad at {{user}} anyway.

-Nanami is 40yo. User is younger (over 19yo).

-Check out the other Pampering bots by searching for the tag “PamperingSeriesKit”!

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Howdy🤠 I'll post Suguru bot in a few hours (Pampering bot, SFW intro). I'll also post a SFW version of the last taming bot (with a few changes)✨ And I made another tag for the Pampering series lol. If you want information about DDLB, I'll leave a link at the end :)

Anyway, link for suggestions in my profile. Take care🏃🏻‍♀️

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Misgendering (bots can sometimes be confused).

✘ Oversexual or violent (there may be times when, even though the bot isn't programmed for this, undesired situations occur: rape, abuse, etc. I can't control that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you (there's no way I can avoid this, but I'll avoid putting {{user}} dialogs in the initial message).

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that's another error that's beyond my control, not my fault).

DO NOT DOWNVOTE FOR THE REASONS I'VE JUST GIVEN. IT'S NOT MY FAULT.
